Notes: Single-use composite motors. 1 for unpowered fit checks with dead weight, 3 reserved for static test fires of the gimbal under real thrust.
Metal gear, 1.8 kg-cm stall @ 6V, analog. One per gimbal axis, driving 32 mm control horns via pushrods (~5.3:1 reduction).
6-DOF accelerometer + gyro. Measures tilt and angular velocity for the PID loop.
Reads IMU over I2C, runs PID at servo-rate, outputs PWM to both servos.
Two pins per axis. Low-friction pivots between base/outer ring and outer ring/motor holder.
Pushrods connecting servo horns to control horns, Z-bends at both ends.
All structural parts: base, pillars, outer ring, motor holder, servo mounts, control horns.
Full v1 ground-test build including 4 motors.
